overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street. The player moves from a covered sidewalk under elevated highways, curves through an open intersection area with passing vehicles, and turns onto a narrower commercial street with dense cyberpunk architecture and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with active steam vents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward along the sidewalk under the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure casting shadows over the street
industrial steam vents releasing white vapor along the left side of the path
silver metal barrier separating sidewalk from the steam vents and lower area
large illuminated sign with Japanese characters and red neon lighting
tall cyberpunk architecture with multiple levels and industrial details

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Steam vents on the left release white vapor into the air, while futuristic buildings with neon signage line the right side. The environment is sheltered and narrow, with the highway structure dominating the upper portion of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved pedestrian walkway emerging from under elevated highway ramps into open area

events.description: exiting the covered overpass section into a more open area with visible sky and highway ramps
path curves significantly to the right following the bend of the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: following the curved sidewalk as it bends to the right, moving from enclosed space to open area

entered.detail: curved highway ramp structure becoming visible as the path opens up
massive colorful digital screen displaying advertisements above the street level
tall industrial street lamp with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed overpass to a more open curved walkway. The path bends to the right, revealing massive elevated highway ramps overhead and a large digital billboard in the distance. The lighting shifts to direct sunlight as the camera emerges from the shadows, with the steam vents now behind and the urban landscape opening up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open curved street with elevated highways overhead and dense commercial neon signage

events.description: futuristic black vehicle with red taillights drives past on the right side of the road
passing a pedestrian walking ahead on the same sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk, passing a pedestrian and observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera
futuristic car driving along the road with glowing red taillights

entered.detail: commercial buildings with bright neon signs and holographic displays
green street sign with white text reading 'Allen' becoming visible at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the wide curved street beneath the elevated highway structure. A pedestrian walks ahead on the sidewalk while futuristic vehicles pass by on the road. Neon storefronts line the right side with bright holographic displays, and the street sign for 'Allen' street becomes visible as the intersection approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street intersection with crosswalk and dense urban storefronts under overpass

events.description: turning left at the Allen Street intersection onto a new street with different architecture
crossing the street at the zebra crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection onto Allen Street, crossing the road and entering a narrower commercial street

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing at the Allen Street intersection
green and brown cyberpunk buildings with circular windows and neon signage
new set of industrial steam vents releasing vapor on the left side of the new street

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins with a left turn at the Allen Street intersection, crossing the zebra-striped crosswalk. The environment shifts to a narrower commercial street with new buildings featuring green facades and circular windows. Steam vents appear again on the left as the camera proceeds under another overpass section, with the street now lined with different neon storefronts and signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered concrete underpass into a bright urban intersection before turning into a dense commercial district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass where white vapor from steam vents drifts past neon-lit buildings in a narrow, shadowed corridor. As the camera moves forward, the path bends to the right and emerges from the shadows into direct sunlight, opening up to reveal towering highway ramps and a distant digital billboard. The scene then expands across a wide curved street with passing futuristic vehicles and holographic storefronts before approaching the Allen Street intersection. Finally, the camera turns left across a zebra-striped crosswalk, shifting into a narrower street characterized by green facades, circular windows, and a return to the atmospheric steam of another overpass.
